items.title: Chinese photonic chipmaker Yuanjie reported 2025 revenue up 138.5% YoY to ~$86.99M, data center revenue up 719% to ~$56.89M, ahead of its April 1 Hong Kong IPO (Wency Chen/South China Morning Post)
items.title_original: Chinese photonic chipmaker Yuanjie reported 2025 revenue up 138.5% YoY to ~$86.99M, data center revenue up 719% to ~$56.89M, ahead of its April 1 Hong Kong IPO (Wency Chen/South China Morning Post)
items.title_en: Chinese photonic chipmaker Yuanjie reported 2025 revenue up 138.5% YoY to ~$86.99M, data center revenue up 719% to ~$56.89M, ahead of its April 1 Hong Kong IPO (Wency Chen/South China Morning Post)
items.title_zh: 中国光子芯片制造商元杰报告称，在 4 月 1 日香港 IPO 之前，2025 年收入同比增长 138.5% 至约 8699 万美元，数据中心收入增长 719% 至约 5689 万美元（Wency Chen/南华早报）
items.title_bilingual: 中国光子芯片制造商元杰报告称，在 4 月 1 日香港 IPO 之前，2025 年收入同比增长 138.5% 至约 8699 万美元，数据中心收入增长 719% 至约 5689 万美元（Wency Chen/南华早报） / Chinese photonic chipmaker Yuanjie reported 2025 revenue up 138.5% YoY to ~$86.99M, data center revenue up 719% to ~$56.89M, ahead of its April 1 Hong Kong IPO (Wency Chen/South China Morning Post)
